sections.heading: Make Every Meal Last 10X Longer For A Healthy Life
sections.text: Make Every Meal Last 10X Longer For A Healthy Life Slowing eating from 30 seconds to 5 minutes dramatically reduces the risk of gastric bloat (GDV) - a condition that kills 30% of affected dogs. Plus eliminates vomiting, choking, and painful gas that plague fast eaters.

sections.heading: Transforms Dangerous Gulping into Healthy Eating
sections.text: Transforms Dangerous Gulping into Healthy Eating Your dog finally chews their food properly, improving nutrient absorption and digestion. No more scary choking sounds, post-meal vomiting, or emergency vet visits. Every meal becomes safe and comfortable.

sections.heading: What Makes PaceBowl Different
sections.text: What Makes PaceBowl Different Premium materials and thoughtful design for years of healthy meals check_circle Premium 304 Stainless Steel Medical-grade material that's bacteria-resistant, dishwasher safe, and lasts forever. No rust, no toxins, no replacement needed. check_circle Perfectly Sized Honeycomb Maze Hexagonal patterns slow eating by 10x without frustration. Works for all snout shapes from pugs to collies. check_circle Anti-Slip Rubber Base Heavy-duty rubber keeps bowl firmly in place. No sliding, no noise, no mess - even with aggressive eaters. check_circle Optimal 2-4 Cup Capacity Perfect for small to medium dogs. Low 1.6" height prevents neck strain. Wide 8.6" diameter ensures comfortable eating.

sections.heading: Real Stories From Dog Moms Who Transformed Mealtime
sections.text: Real Stories From Dog Moms Who Transformed Mealtime ★★★★★ No More Midnight Vomit Wake-Ups! My beagle Bailey used to throw up every night from eating too fast. First night with PaceBowl - NOTHING! It's been 3 months and not a single incident. He actually chews now! The honeycomb design is genius. Easy to clean too. Worth every penny for peaceful nights. Emma Rodriguez ★★★★★ Vet Shocked at Her Weight Loss! My corgi Bella dropped 8 pounds in 2 months just from this bowl! She went from inhaling food in 20 seconds to actually working for it. Now takes her 6-7 minutes. No diet change, just slower eating. My vet asked what I did differently. Buying another for my mom's dog! Ashley Chen ★★★★★ Finally - A Bowl That Actually Works! Tried 3 other slow feeders. My lab figured them all out. This honeycomb design? Game changer. Takes her full 5 minutes every meal now. No more bloat scares, no more anxiety watching her eat. She seems happier too - like she's playing a game. Already recommended to my whole dog park group! Maria Thompson

sections.heading: FAQs
sections.text: FAQs check_box Will this work for my flat-faced dog (pug, bulldog, etc.)? Yes! The honeycomb design is actually easier for flat-faced breeds than spiral mazes. The hexagonal compartments are shallow enough for pugs and bulldogs to access comfortably while still slowing them down effectively. We have hundreds of happy flat-faced customers. check_box My dog is really smart - won't they figure out how to eat fast anyway? Even the smartest dogs can't physically bypass the honeycomb barriers. Unlike simple raised bumps they can eat around, our maze requires them to use their tongue to access each section individually. Studies show dogs may adapt slightly but still eat 8-10x slower than with regular bowls. check_box What if my dog gets frustrated and stops eating? This rarely happens! 98% of dogs adapt within their first meal. The honeycomb design provides challenge without frustration. If your dog seems hesitant, try mixing in a small amount of wet food or treats initially. Our 90-day guarantee means you can return it if your dog truly won't use it. check_box Is 2-4 cups enough for my medium/large dog? The 2-4 cup capacity is per meal, not per day. Most medium dogs eat 1.5-3 cups per meal, making this perfect. For larger dogs (over 60 lbs), you may need to split meals or consider buying two bowls. The slower eating actually helps dogs feel fuller with less food. check_box How do I clean the maze sections? Super easy! The stainless steel is completely dishwasher safe - just place it on the top rack. For hand washing, the smooth steel surface rinses clean easily. No hidden crevices where food gets stuck like with plastic maze bowls. Most customers just rinse and dishwasher it daily. check_box Will the bowl slide around while my dog eats? No!
